name: part_002
file: tmp_【#兎田ぺこら6周年記念LIVE】周年3D LIVE！ぺこらRUSH！！！！！！！ぺこ！【ホロライブ⧸兎田ぺこら】 [E2D_YFRHFG8]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_002.mov

scenes.description: Pekora performs a countdown to start the live performance.
Usada Pekora and Omaru Polka perform the song "Haguruma".
A slot machine mini-game segment plays on the screen, culminating in Pekora's special move.
Usada Pekora and Shishiro Botan begin performing the song "Kokoro ga Tomaranai".

subtitles.original: 咲かすか 枯らすか 今
subtitles.english: To bloom or to wither, right now

subtitles.original: 燃えるように 陽が沈む
subtitles.english: The sun sets as if it's burning

subtitles.original: 歯車が回る
subtitles.english: The gears are turning

subtitles.original: ラッパが鳴れば ジャッカサマサマ 真っ新の物語
subtitles.english: When the trumpet sounds, Jack-a-sama-sama, a brand new story

subtitles.original: はしゃがらばらば はしゃがらばらば 真っ赤な過去が追いかける
subtitles.english: Frolicking and falling apart, a crimson past chases after me

subtitles.original: 道化師の笑み 仮面の裏側 どかしても消えない
subtitles.english: The joker's smile behind the mask won't disappear even if moved

subtitles.original: 傷が痛んでも
subtitles.english: Even if the wound hurts

subtitles.original: 咲かすか 枯らすか 現在
subtitles.english: To bloom or to wither, the present

subtitles.original: 燃えるように 陽が沈む
subtitles.english: The sun sets as if it's burning

subtitles.original: 真夜中の暗い孤独から 繰り出す
subtitles.english: Moving out from the dark midnight solitude

subtitles.original: 微かに響く鐘が 陰る日々の道しるべ
subtitles.english: A faintly echoing bell is the guidepost for the darkening days

subtitles.original: 音の鳴る先へ
subtitles.english: Towards where the sound is made

subtitles.original: ラッパが鳴れば ジャッカワラワラ 真っ新の演目の応酬
subtitles.english: When the trumpet sounds, Jack-a-wara-wara, an exchange of brand new performances

subtitles.original: 真っ暗のまま 変わらぬ間 真逆様 突っ伏すのに
subtitles.english: While it remains pitch dark and unchanging, even though falling face down head-first

subtitles.original: 足を掴まれ 奈落の底まで
subtitles.english: Leg grabbed, down to the bottom of hell

subtitles.original: 明日をも忘れて 息もできない
subtitles.english: Forgetting even tomorrow, unable to breathe

subtitles.original: 咲かすか 枯らすか 現在
subtitles.english: To bloom or to wither, the present

subtitles.original: 眠るように 目を閉じる
subtitles.english: Close eyes as if sleeping

subtitles.original: 身体中巡る猛毒から 逃げ出す
subtitles.english: Escaping from the deadly poison flowing through my body

subtitles.original: 微かに響く鐘に 耳を澄ませ生きるのか
subtitles.english: Will I live by listening closely to the faintly echoing bell?

subtitles.original: どちらか選べ
subtitles.english: Choose one or the other

subtitles.original: さぁ
subtitles.english: Come on

subtitles.original: 快楽を 爪のように 未来だけ 想えばいい
subtitles.english: Pleasure, like a claw, just think about the future

subtitles.original: 過去を葬り去って
subtitles.english: Bury the past away

subtitles.original: 咲かすか 枯らすか 現在
subtitles.english: To bloom or to wither, the present

subtitles.original: 燃えるように 陽が沈む
subtitles.english: The sun sets as if it's burning

subtitles.original: 真夜中の深い孤独から 繰り出す
subtitles.english: Moving out from the deep midnight solitude

subtitles.original: 運命が壊れるような 声で叫べ 始まりの
subtitles.english: Scream with a voice that could break fate, the signal

subtitles.original: 合図 幕は今 舞って踊るさ
subtitles.english: For the start, the curtain now flutters and dances

subtitles.original: 最期には 涙流す だから今は 耐え進む
subtitles.english: Shedding tears at the end, so for now, I endure and move forward

subtitles.original: 幕が降りる その時まで まだ 絶えず
subtitles.english: Until the curtain falls, still, without ceasing

subtitles.original: 歯車が回る
subtitles.english: The gears are turning

subtitles.original: 究極 Vモンキー！
subtitles.english: Ultimate V Monkey!

subtitles.original: ココロが止まらない
subtitles.english: My heart won't stop

subtitles.original: 何かをするのに 理由なんかいらないね
subtitles.english: I don't need a reason to do something
